title: Complex Line Bundle Of Filled States
summary: For a two-band system with one filled band, the occupied state at each regular momentum defines a one-dimensional complex vector space; together these fibers form the line bundle on which the Berry connection lives.
assumptions: Exactly one band is filled in the local two-band discussion.
Bad points are removed from the base space.
scope: Lecture One geometric reformulation of the occupied-state phase problem.

source_anchors.notes: The line-bundle picture underlies the Berry connection construction.

symmetries: U(1) phase redundancy in local eigenvector choices.
representation: Rank-one complex vector bundle over regular momentum space.
failure_modes: For multiple filled bands the geometry becomes non-abelian rather than a line bundle.
retrieval_hints: Use for geometric explanations of Berry phase and curvature.
